'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=uRoZZno8FJlKkv8f9xALzfXdAiRhRXKP40R54t0rhPc-1773606756-1.0.1.1-L0a.GLDtORhzKM1XzItN7.N8uLZqi.4yTvpjZCZ0SWk"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
